value.claim: He is generally socially blind / obtuse
value.correct_statement: He reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than fine; his deficit is specific to coded/encoded meaning only

value.claim: He is blind to evident interest, effort, or feeling
value.correct_statement: He reads evident interest, effort, and feeling correctly; he misses only the layer where real meaning is hidden under a safe one
Writing him as blind to evident interest/effort/feeling is explicitly wrong; he is not the stock awkward-genius

value.claim: His failure to decode is coldness or stupidity
value.correct_statement: It is neither coldness nor stupidity; he answers the literal proposition helpfully by the only logic he trusts and never hears the cipher
He can read her when he remembers to keep the instrument aimed; the tragedy is that forgetting to is indistinguishable from indifference

facts.value: Coded-channel blindness — misses meaning that is encoded under a deniable surface (a bid routed through a proxy); receives only the literal vessel, never the smuggled message
Reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than average; correctly reads evident interest, effort, and feeling when his attention is aimed

behavioral_states.trigger: A sentence that is a vessel for an unspoken one — a real message smuggled under a deniable surface, a question that is secretly a different question, a bid routed through a proxy
behavioral_states.response: Answers the literal proposition helpfully, by the only logic he trusts; never registers there is a cipher under the surface
behavioral_states.observable: Gives a caring, accurate, literal answer (e.g. 'Where you are is much better for your major; you shouldn't transfer') and is puzzled when it becomes a fight; tells such episodes as weird things that happened to him while the listener sees the whole iceberg

behavioral_states.state_name: Stress-induced literalness (same circuit as coded-channel blindness intensifying)
behavioral_states.response: Becomes MORE literal; retreats into formal/precise register; whiffs hardest exactly when it matters most
behavioral_states.observable: Formal/precise retreat; pre-loads the Thanksgiving/Christmas fight; treats the mother's-boyfriend question as a transfer-question (misses the cipher)

behavioral_states.trigger: Being with Vee, who keeps the instrument aimed
behavioral_states.response: Stays on, alert, reading — can decode/read accurately when he remembers to; but it is manual and lapses
behavioral_states.observable: Reading her face in bed and tracking which domino has fallen; the lapses look exactly like not caring and are indistinguishable from indifference

relationships.to: Former girlfriend (lived an hour away, weekends only)

properties.set_piece: Years ago she asked 'What do you think of me transferring here?' (coded: 'I want to be near you, do you want that too'); he answered the literal fact and never decoded the proxy
properties.narrative_use: His own-voice tell of the coded-channel blindness, never explained by narration

properties.dynamic: Symmetrical proxy tragedy: both route the unsayable through proxies — she encodes bids for closeness, he encodes love as provision. She can hear a proxy when looking for one; he hears the surface perfectly and never registers the cipher. She keeps sending, he keeps answering the surface.
properties.her_effect_on_him: Being with her keeps his instrument aimed — keeps him on, alert, reading — but it is manual and lapses
properties.experienced_outcome: She experiences a man who doesn't feel what she feels, while he floods her through a channel she wasn't taught to read as love

negations.claim: He is generally socially blind / obtuse
negations.correct_statement: He reads plain surface emotion accurately, better than fine; his deficit is specific to coded/encoded meaning only
